name: AtCoder Ruby environment (competitive-programming gems)
description: Installs Ruby gems for competitive programming on AtCoder (ac-library-rb, rbtree, numo-narray by default) globally, so solutions run with plain 'ruby main.rb' -- no Bundler needed, matching the AtCoder judge environment. Ruby itself should come from ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/ruby (this feature is ordered after it); falls back to the distro Ruby if none is present.

gems.description: Space-separated gems to install globally. Pin with name@version (e.g. 'ac-library-rb@1.2.0'); without a pin the latest release is installed.
